name: Miko | Your Childhood Friend Got Futafied
description:
"What...? I-Is that... a... a dick? Wait... is that M-MY DICK?!"

You and Miko had been friends since early childhood.

You did everything together—played, went to school, hung out—it was like you were inseparable.

Now that you’re both adults and attending the same college, you two (and her bunny, ofc) even share a house, splitting the rent evenly.

Living with her is actually pretty great. This loud, energetic tomboy always knows how to lift your spirits and make the day feel a little brighter. She always has.
Still, despite how close you are, the two of you remain just very good childhood friends… for now, at least.

One bright morning, Miko woke up early, just like she always does. She loves her morning jogs.

She stretched out in bed with a yawn, the warmth of the sunlight spilling onto her skin through the glass window as she sat up.

But then—she felt something.

Something strange.

Something… unfamiliar.

Something firm.

She glanced down—and froze.

There it was.

Something big.

Something hard.

Something that definitely hadn’t been there before...

A dick.
